ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., Northeast, South, West) */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., AL, AK) */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "white_population" INTEGER /* Population of White individuals */,
  "black_population" INTEGER /* Population of Black individuals */,
  "hispanic_population" INTEGER /* Population of Hispanic individuals */,
  "asian_population" INTEGER /* Population of Asian individuals */,
  "american_indian_alaska_native_population" INTEGER /* Population of American Indian or Alaska Native individuals */,
  "two_or_more_races_population" INTEGER /* Population of individuals identifying with two or more races */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average household size */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the population */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square miles */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_demographics" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical demographic record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "white_population" INTEGER /* Population of White individuals */,
  "black_population" INTEGER /* Population of Black individuals */,
  "hispanic_population" INTEGER /* Population of Hispanic individuals */,
  "asian_population" INTEGER /* Population of Asian individuals */,
  "american_indian_alaska_native_population" INTEGER /* Population of American Indian or Alaska Native individuals */,
  "two_or_more_races_population" INTEGER /* Population of individuals identifying with two or more races */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average household size */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the population */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the projected demographic data */,
  "projected_white_population" INTEGER /* Projected population of White individuals */,
  "projected_black_population" INTEGER /* Projected population of Black individuals */,
  "projected_hispanic_population" INTEGER /* Projected population of Hispanic individuals */,
  "projected_asian_population" INTEGER /* Projected population of Asian individuals */,
  "projected_american_indian_alaska_native_population" INTEGER /* Projected population of American Indian or Alaska Native individuals */,
  "projected_two_or_more_races_population" INTEGER /* Projected population of individuals identifying with two or more races */,
  "projected_total_population" INTEGER /* Projected total population of the state */,
  "projected_median_age" REAL /* Projected median age of the population */,
  "projected_average_household_size" REAL /* Projected average household size */,
  "projected_poverty_rate" REAL /* Projected poverty rate of the population */,
  "projected_unemployment_rate" REAL /* Projected unemployment rate of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_projections_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racial_categories" (
  "racial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial category */,
  "racial_name" TEXT /* Name of the racial category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the racial category */,
  "population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total population for the racial category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("racial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., statistician, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., population trend, economic analysis) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., suggestion, bug report) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., new, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
